headline: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
summary: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

raw.headline: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
raw.summary: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

headline: NextEra Energy announces date for release of first-quarter 2026 financial results
summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) today announced that it plans to report first-quarter 2026 financial results before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday, April 23, 2026, in a news release to be posted on the company's website at www.NextEraEnergy.com/FinancialResults. The company will issue an advisory news release over PR Newswire the morning of April 23, with a link to the financial results news release on the company's website.
